quotes.text: To be yourself in a world that is constantly trying to make you something else is the greatest accomplishment.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: Do not go where the path may lead, go instead where there is no path and leave a trail.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: The only person you are destined to become is the person you decide to be.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: It is not the length of life, but the depth.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: Adopt the pace of nature: her secret is patience.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: The earth laughs in flowers.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: Life is a journey, not a destination.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: Nothing great was ever achieved without enthusiasm.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: Write it on your heart that every day is the best day in the year.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: Once you make a decision, the universe conspires to make it happen.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: The creation of a thousand forests is in one acorn.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: Our greatest glory is not in never failing, but in rising up every time we fail.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: Finish each day and be done with it. You have done what you could. Some blunders and absurdities no doubt crept in; forget them as soon as you can.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: The mind, once stretched by a new idea, never returns to its original dimensions.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: For every minute you are angry you lose sixty seconds of happiness.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: Be not the slave of your own past. Plunge into the sublime seas, dive deep and swim far.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: People wish to be settled; only as far as they are unsettled is there any hope for them.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: The purpose of life is not to be happy. It is to be useful, to be honorable, to be compassionate, to have it make some difference that you have lived.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: Every artist was first an amateur.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: Without ambition one starts nothing. Without work one finishes nothing. The prize will not be sent to you. You have to win it.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: Dare to live the life you have dreamed for yourself. Go forward and make your dreams come true.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: Peace cannot be achieved through violence, it can only be attained through understanding.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: The reward of a thing well done is having done it.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: All life is an experiment. The more experiments you make, the better.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: Shallow men believe in luck. Strong men believe in cause and effect.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: Cultivate the habit of being grateful for every good thing that comes to you, and to give thanks continuously.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: A man is what he thinks about all day long.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: To be great is to be misunderstood.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: The only way to have a friend is to be one.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson
